result.markdown: --- title: core.transitions.DeterministicTransitions --- ```python core.transitions.DeterministicTransitions( series, jump_times, jump_values, method, method_args=None, label=None, statistics=None, ) ``` [[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/core/transitions.py#L25-L445){.source-link target="_blank"} Container for deterministic transition detection results Stores results from tipping point detection algorithms with methods for analysis and visualization. ## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters} [**series**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[ammonyte](`ammonyte`).[Series](`ammonyte.Series`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Original time series object [**jump_times**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array](`array`) - [like](`like`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Array of detected transition times [**jump_values**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array](`array`) - [like](`like`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Array of transition directions (+1 upward, -1 downward) [**method**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Name of detection method used [**method_args**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Dictionary of method parameters [**label**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default} : Label for the results [**d_statistics**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array](`array`) - [like](`like`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Array of KS D-statistics corresponding to each transition [**p_values**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([array](`array`) - [like](`like`), [optional](`optional`))]{.parameter-annotation} : Array of p-values corresponding to each transition ## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples} Basic transition detection: ::: {#7e8f6177 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os, ammonyte as amt ngrip = amt.Series.from_csv(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(amt.__file__), 'data', 'NGRIP.csv')) transitions = ngrip.kstest(w_min=0.12, w_max=2.5, n_w=15, d_c=0.77, n_c=3, s_c=2, x_c=0.8) print(transitions) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Time axis values sorted in ascending order Time axis values sorted in ascending order Deterministic Transition Detection Results -
